== Notes for [[Item:Q116854|Q116854]] ==

DUP of https://www.geni.com/people/Ramiro-I-rey-de-Asturias/6000000000033298652

------

father of https://www.geni.com/people/Rodrigo-I-conde-de-Castilla/6000000000424637456 (MP abandoned locked)
by wiki https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rodrigo_of_Castile

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
